prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为27189→24868→33109→34968→28849，整体呈波动上升趋势，2023–2024年位次明显后移，2025年大幅回升至28849名，近3年波动 幅度约6000名，2025年基准位次约28849名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021年25人、2022年28人、2023年29人、2024年30人、2025年34人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划增至37人，较2025年增加3人（+8.8%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京中医药大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名 从2021年第103名持续上升至2025年第61名、2026年第63名，近年排名大幅提升，学校综合实力和认可度显著增强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要因2 025年录取季在河北、河南等地位次下滑超500名，中医学专业在部分省份出现断档，可能对2026年报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第103位，评价为一般，短视频曝光 量较低；中医学、中西医结合、中），与物理类招生专业中医学、中西医临床医学、中药学 等高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业（临床医学、口腔医学等）在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续高热推荐，中医药作为医学重要 分支受益于整体医学热度；广东省2026年物理类考生456,000人，较2025年440,208人增加约15,792人（+3.6%），竞争加剧；北京中医药大学位于北京，属外省高校，广东省非其生源大省；该校在广东省无本地招生倾斜，跨省报考需考虑地域偏好因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次28849名、2026年扩招3人（+8.8%）对位次的后移作用、软科排名持续上升对报考热度的正面拉动、物理类考生增加约3.6%带来的竞争加剧、以及声誉偏负面 可能造成的轻微报考降温，预计2026年物理类最低位次约29800名，区间29300–30300名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 中医学（领军人才培养计划/岐黄班/王琦班）
- 中西医临床医学（华佗班）
- 中医学（卓越“5+3”一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 中医学（实验班/卓越中医儿科班）
- 中药学（时珍国药正华班/生物联培实验班）
- 药学
- 中医骨伤科学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 针灸推拿学
- 生物工程（交叉创新班）
- 中药制药
- 大数据管理与应用
- 公共事业管理（卫生管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间29300–30300名内，建议以二档专业（中医学实验班、中药学、药学等）为主攻方向，一档专业（领军人才培养计划、华佗班等）作为冲刺，三档专业（针灸推拿 学、生物工程等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<29300名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 27189 → 24868 → 33109 → 34968 → 28849, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. Rankings significantly dropped in 2023–2024, then rebounded sharply to 28849 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 6000 positions in the past 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 28849. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 25 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 34 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan increases to 37, an increase of 3 (+8.8%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has risen continuously from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, with a significant improvement in recent years, greatly enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to a ranking drop of over 500 positions in Hebei, Henan and other regions during the 2025 admission season, and a gap in the Chinese Medicine major in some provinces, which may have a certain negative impact on the 2026 application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 103rd, rated as average, with low short video exposure. Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine, and Chinese Materia Medica correspond highly to the Physics Category majors such as Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine, and Chinese Materia Medica, providing strong attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, etc.) continue to be highly recommended in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, and Chinese Medicine, as an important branch of medicine, benefits from the overall medical popularity. In 2026, Guangdong Province has 456,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.6%) compared to 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, an out-of-province university, and Guangdong is not its main source province. The university has no local enrollment preference in Guangdong, so cross-province applications need to consider regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 28849, the ranking-lowering effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of 3 (+8.8%), the positive pull of the continuously rising Soft Science ranking on application popularity, the intensified competition due to a 3.6% increase in Physics Category candidates, and the slight cooling of applications due to the slightly negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 29800, with a range of 29300–30300.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Chinese Medicine (Leading Talent Training Program/Qihuang Class/Wang Qi Class)
- Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine (Hua Tuo Class)
- Chinese Medicine (Excellent "5+3" Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Chinese Medicine (Experimental Class/Excellent Chinese Medicine Pediatrics Class)
- Chinese Materia Medica (Shizhen National Medicine Zhenghua Class/Bio-Integrated Experimental Class)
- Pharmacy
- Orthopedics of Chinese Medicine.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Acupuncture and Tuina
- Bioengineering (Cross-Innovation Class)
- Chinese Medicine Pharmaceutics
- Big Data Management and Application
- Public Service Management (Health Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 29300–30300, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chinese Medicine Experimental Class, Chinese Materia Medica, Pharmacy, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Leading Talent Training Program, Hua Tuo Class, etc.) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Acupuncture and Tuina, Bioengineering, etc.) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<29300), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 4085 → 5397 → 6509 → 5882 → 6531, showing an overall backward trend. Rankings declined year by year from 2021 to 2023, slightly recovered to 5882 in 2024, and then moved back to 6531 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 650 places, with the baseline ranking for 2025 at approximately 6531. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong Province was 8 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. The 2026 plan increases to 6, an increase of 1 (+20%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, showing a significant improvement in recent years, greatly enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to a ranking decline of over 500 places in Hebei, Henan, and other regions during the 2025 admission season, which may have a certain negative impact on the application psychology for 2026. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average. Majors such as Traditional Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine, and Chinese Materia Medica, along with History Category admission majors like Law (Medicine and Health), English (Medicine/International Communication of Chinese Medicine), and Public Administration (Health Management), are combined with the characteristics of Chinese medicine, offering differentiated competitive advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, Guangdong Province has 326,200 History Category examinees, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) compared to 292,200 in 2025, a significant increase that intensifies competition. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, an out-of-province university, and Guangdong is not its major source province. The university has no local admission preference in Guangdong, so cross-province applications need to consider regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6531, the backward effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of 1 (+20%), the positive pull of the continuously rising Soft Science ranking on application popularity, the significant competition intensification due to the approximately 11.6% increase in History Category examinees, and the slight cooling effect from the negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be around 7200, with a range of 6700–7700.

- Acupuncture and Tuina.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6700–7700, there are fewer History Category admission majors. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Law Medicine and Health, Acupuncture and Tuina) as a reach. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6700), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors.
